motivation.prior_result: The causally gated 2022-2023 experiment produced 62 screen passes, but all 12 representatives belonged to price_flow_catchup and all failed 2024 realistic selection.
motivation.observed_asymmetry: In the broad 2024 candidate, ETH-follower trades were approximately flat-to-positive while BTC-follower longs produced most losses. This is hypothesis-generation information, so 2024 is included in the new development set and is not treated as validation.
motivation.economic_hypothesis: BTC is the dominant price-discovery anchor. A BTC price-plus-aggressive-flow shock may propagate to ETH, especially downside. An ETH-first shock is more likely idiosyncratic and may predict BTC mean reversion rather than BTC catch-up.

families: ETH to BTC short-only mean-reversion routing

causality.signal_data: completed 5-minute klines and delayed published metrics only
causality.oi_delay: one additional completed 5-minute bar after the aligned metric observation
causality.feature_calibration: rolling means and standard deviations exclude the current observation
causality.missing_data: features and holding paths crossing a missing bar are invalid
causality.global_slot: one pending or open BTC/ETH exposure
causality.funding: actual settlement events use the last bar completed by settlement time

primary_selection: Highest preregistered development score after mandatory family-regime diversity; no 2025 information is used.
target_gate: base geometric mean daily return >= 0.01 after all stated costs
prohibitions: No 2025 opening unless a primary passes all development gates
No leverage or risk fitting to the target
No paper, testnet, or live order
